title: Peppery Indian Carrot Stir-Fry
description: A vibrant and flavorful meal-prep French dish featuring crispy carrots enhanced with black treacle and garnished with fresh herbs for a jain-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Black Treacle
ingredients.notes: Toasted and finely grated for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Red Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a mild to spicy kick, adjust accordingly

instructions: Grate the carrots and set aside.
To toast black treacle, place it in a small pan over medium heat. Stir frequently until lightly golden, about 2-3 minutes.
In a large skillet, add olive oil. Sauté minced garlic for about 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add grated carrots to the skillet and toss with black treacle and red chili flakes. Cook for about 5 minutes on medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until the carrots are crisp-tender.
Once fully cooked, remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
Combine cooled carrot mixture with chopped cilantro leaves and mint leaves. Mix well to combine.
Serve immediately as a snack or meal-prep portion.
